programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A skeptical doctor wants to prove to his desperate friend with a sick daughter that the local legendary healer he wants to see is a fraud

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: Holly the lead in a childrens TV series isnt the nice puppet she pretends to be

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Bloodlines teenager Lisa agrees to swap babysitting duties with her friend Heidi as a favor She discovers that a relative who is locked in the familys cellar wants revenge - even invading her dreams to get it

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A greedy married man blackmails his eccentric beekeeper neighbor to market his tasty honey for him and make a bundle He also falls for the beekeepers mysterious seductive vamp girlfriend

programme.title: The USS Enterprise and the Battle of Midway
programme.desc: After expanding the war in the Pacific to include western outposts the Japanese Empire had attained its initial strategic goals quickly taking British Hong Kong the Philippines British Malaya Singapore and the Dutch East Indies modern Indonesia The Dutch East Indies with its vital oil resources was particularly important to Japan Because of this preliminary planning for the second phase of operations commenced as early as January 1942

programme.title: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: In 1942 two German battle-cruisers the Scharnhorst and the Gneisenau put into a French port for repairs and became trapped there targets to be bombed at will by the RAF It was only a matter of time before they would attempt an escape Churchill ordered that the ships must not reach Germany and that they must be destroyed The plan to do so was called Operation Fuller However when the moment came to put the operation into action the plans were locked in a safe and the only man with a key was away on holiday What happened next was a series of one farcical mistake after another which allowed the two German ships to sail right up the English channel and home to Germany The programme also features Operation Eagle Claw the clandestine operation ordered by President Carter in 1980 to free the American hostages held in the Tehran embassy The newly formed Special Operations Group Delta Force began planning a daring rescue However inter-service rivalry intervened with tragic results when the American aircraft carrying the rescue teams crashed into each other in the Iranian desert

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: Shot At Dawn WW1

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: This touching documentary investigates the tragic stories of the 306 British Commonwealth soldiers shot for acts of cowardice and desertion during World War One

programme.title: The Falklands War
programme.desc: This landmark documentary was produced 5 years after the end of The Falklands War and features interviews and insights from both the Argentinian and British sides

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt3
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: Follow The Flag
programme.desc: The Flag Marine Corps Documentary

programme.title: Freddy Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Dream Come True the new host of Springwood Confidential Dick Gautier doesnt heed Freddy Kruegers warning to ax his latest show topic Dreams That Kill Meanwhile a doctor performs an experimental procedure that results in a patient Christian Bocher acquiring another mans personality -- and dreams

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy wants to make sure her honeymoon turns out perfect

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Jonas has been forced into mandatory retirement He cant relax though because Anitas friends are driving him crazy

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Loud arrogant and obnoxious criminal Trout feels a strong kinship with and develops an immediate affinity for nerdy mild-mannered and soft-spoken serial killer Wax However the close bond between these two radically contrasting lunatics falls apart after the pair pick up a brash prostitute

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Deranged Peter relentlessly stalks and terrorizes Teresa a lovely young lady who Peter thinks is his ex-wife Melissa Peter frightens Teresa out of her wits by playing a series of cruel jokes on her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Knight 311
programme.desc: Knight 311

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A family of militia types is being hunted by a demon

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Photo Finish a phony psychic channeler becomes possessed by Freddy Krueger Meanwhile Freddy makes a surprise appearance at his class reunion to get even with the prom date who scorned him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate pointedly tells Luke that he is welcome to go fishing with Grandpa and Mac Maginnis and to do whatever he wishes for several nights thereafter but Grandpa steps in to make amends when he realizes that Lukes freedom is causing a genuine strain on their still-young marriage

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 join a motorcycle gang to save a kidnapped Prime Minister

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must find an antidote after he is poisoned by a KAOS agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ befriends a woman who is suspected of being a witch by the people from the town in which she lives They have to deal with a plot to get rid of her that is hatched by the supersticious locals

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Col Hogan is less than thrilled when he is assigned to help an obnoxious American general flee Stalag 13 - and the secret plan involving a prisoner swap winds up as trying and difficult as the arrogant escapee himself

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When the gangs hidden cache of money - needed to purchase a secret map - goes up in smoke the men of Stalag 13 must come up with a way to replace the cash - and decide to pull off a bank heist in the nearby town

programme.title: Mchale 327
programme.desc: Mchale 327

programme.title: Mchale 334
programme.desc: Mchale 334

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation feeling that he hasnt done his job correctly if he isnt hated by ALL the recruits Sgt Carter asks for a transfer to California but things dont go quite as he expects

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Call girl Lexy Gardner is shot dead so her mother hires Dan to find out who did it and how Lexy wound up hooking The case expands to involve singer Eddie Banning tennis pro Lou Spitz and contractor William Virgil

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a prostitute is murdered one of Jennifers former sources asks her to investigate

programme.title: Newhart - 805
programme.desc: Newhart - 805

programme.title: Newhart - 721
programme.desc: Newhart - 721

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: After Mitch saves a young girl from drowning he discovers her to be possessed by a demon who then possesses him for the demon needs a sacrifice to solidify its base of power on Earth Aware that time is running out for him Mitch must venture into the netherworld to find help from the only one who can battle the demon the recently deceased Stephanie Holden

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 109
programme.desc: Hercules 109

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone and Marquette must find James Pike a mysterious escaped serial killer who rose from the dead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Mana forces a dying surgeon to conduct experiments on patients in his hospital attempting to implant alien embryos into human hosts

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane makes a woman look like Hollands wife He makes sure Holland aka Swamp Thing sees her He approaches her and she runs away He later tests her She then asks him for his notes hoping it could help him But Arcane is after one of his formulas At the same time Holland recalls his last moments with his wife and moment when he became Swamp Thing because of Arcane

programme.title: Android
programme.desc: A strange doctor secretly experiments with androids on his space station His assistant is Max a curious android who wants to see the world and meet a girl Criminals hide on their station and soon violence erupts

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The moon is approaching a black hole Professor Bergman is a able to rig up an energy shield around the moonbase but Commander Koenig feels this is only a desperate measure and has an eagle with six personnel dispatched as the rest of the moonbase await certain death

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 204
programme.desc: Hercules 204

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Noah is taken into slavery when he tries to free his former teacher Calvin Roundtree

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two Gunsmoke writers teamed on this modern-day Western set at a rodeo in San Franciscos Cow Palace A bronc rider dies in what appears to be an accident A rodeo clown looks around the scene after the police leave and discovers the riders rope -- which was cut almost halfway through before it broke leaving the bronc free to throw him The police come back to investigate the scene and before long the chief suspect is also murdered in another accident

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An enemy agents kidnapped 2 scientists and their wives and is holding them in San Francisco He wants a third scientist who can help develop an ultimate weapon Phelps devises a plan where hell pose as the scientist being sought whilst the rest of the IM force fakes an earthquake

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A woman hires Kimble to drive her daughter and herself to California The young girl has a rabbit with her that had been a test subject in a research study and is infected with meningitis

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An old love of Heaths who had jilted him five years before convinces him to help get her Mexican husband to the US The husband is a Revolutionary wanted by the Federales - and a man with questionable motives

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into a town looking for a job He runs into a hired killer he knows who tries to kill him but is shot by the local sheriff Once he learns who the man was the sheriff hires Cheyenne to work undercover to find who hired him

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Hickok falls in love with a woman who belongs to an unwanted religious group but must first settle an old score with a gunfighter

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: The Hitman
programme.desc: A Cop goes undercover as a Hitman to bring down a criminal organization

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: The Presidents Man
programme.desc: A US presidents highly classified secret agent must find a fearless replacement to take over his extremely dangerous military missions

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp

programme.title: Episode 4–Mob Candy

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jal Rorda Audrics loyal friend is tricked and captured by Saw Boss where the evil scientist Dr Zorg is zapping him with the mindsifter to discover Audrics whereabouts Jayce defies Saw Boss and goes to the planet Nar to rescue Jal Gorda

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Oon is recalled by the Squire Smith for his obvious fear in the face of Monster Minds Oon fears he will be melted down Upon arriving on the Squire Smiths planet Oon walks into a trap set by Monster Minds He then proves himself to the Squire

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is firing all the cannonballs on Captain Kidds island to retrieve the gold hidden inside of them Their activity draws the attention of MASK

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An explorer discovers an ancient Mayan City where giant stones become weightless under the full moonlight He sells this information to Miles Mayhem while Matt Trakker mounts his own excursion to the same location

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kills toy reduces the human race to electrical impulses imprisoned within five crystal globes

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill faces a threat from within as Zero rallies disgruntled Renegades into a faction that opposes both the Guardians and the Renegades; with Turbo and Crasher as hostages the rebels set out to lure Leader-1 and Cy-Kill to their destruction
